name: Feature request
about: Suggest an improvement to the template skeleton, tooling, or docs
labels: enhancement
---

## Problem statement

What problem does this feature solve? Who encounters it and when?

## Proposed solution

Describe the change you would like to see.

## Alternatives considered

Any other approaches you evaluated and why you chose this one.

## Area

- [ ] `skills/` — skill structure or examples
- [ ] `agents/` — agent structure or examples
- [ ] `scripts/` — lint, doctor, or install scripts
- [ ] `docs/` — conventions, guides
- [ ] `ci/` — GitHub Actions workflows
